title: LogicalNotCondition
description: LogicalNotCondition: Condition that contains a nested condition that it inverses, i.e. the nested condition needs to fail for an object to be considered a pass.

Condition.description: Condition to be inverted. ICondition: Top level interface for conditions: lightweight objects describing a yes/no question to be asked against another object.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
